title: dortmanna coronopifolia var. glabrescens
intro: Dortmanna coronopifolia var. glabrescens, also known as the glabrous wood dock, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Dorstenia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Dortmanna coronopifolia var. glabrescens can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
